security.shown_once_description: Each backup code can be used once. You will not be able to view these exact codes again.
security.copy_failed: Copy failed. Use Select All, then copy manually.
security.app_passwords_description: Use these one-time generated passwords for CalDAV/CardDAV clients that cannot complete interactive two-factor sign-in.
